title: Skylar Realm Essentials
description: This essential modpack will improve visuals & performance & adds the mods needed to experience the full adventure.
body:
## Modpack description:
**Skylar Realm Essentials** is a modpack that improves your Minecraft experience by providing a suite of mods focused on improving functionality, efficiency and better visuals.

## Future updates:
- Skylar Realm will no longer be private

## Current resources used:

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers - tr7zw
- Better Beds - Motschen
- Better Biome Reblend
- Cloth Config API - shedaniel
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine - ishland
- Creative Core - creativemd
- Custom Skin Loader - xfl03
- Embeddium - embeddedt
- Enhanced Block Entities - Foundation Games
- Entity Culling - tr7zw
- Exordium - tr7zw
- Fabric API - modmuss50
- Fabric Language Kotlin - modmuss50
- Faster Random - AnOpenSauceDev
- Ferrite Core - malte0811
- Fishing Rod Fix - andrewchik
- Idle Tweaks - Armandukx
- Immediatly Fast - RaphiMC
- Inventory Profiles Next - blackd
- Iris Shaders - coderbot
- Journeymap - mysticdrew
- Kirin
- Krypton - astei
- Lamb Dynamic Lights - LambdAurora
- Language Reload - Jerozgen
- Lazy DFU - astei
- Lithium - jellysquid3
- M.R.U - mineblock11
- Memory Leak Fix - fx
- Mod Menu

- Sounds - mineblock11
- Starlight - spottedleaf
- Tooltip Fix - kyrptonaught
- ViaBackwards - kennytv

- Yet Another Config Lib - isxander
- Entity Model Features - Traben

</details>

</details>

- Just Expressions - TrasTick

</details>
